items.titolo: Former OpenAI Staffers Warn That xAI’s Poor Safety Record Could Complicate SpaceX’s IPO
items.descrizione: The ex-employees, who cofounded a new AI watchdog group, say investors deserve more information about xAI’s safety practices before SpaceX goes public.

items.titolo: Google I/O 2026 live updates: Biggest news on Android, Gemini AI, XR, and more we're seeing
items.descrizione: We're reporting live from Mountain View at Google's annual developer conference today. Stay tuned for the latest updates.

items.titolo: I’m a Normie. Can Normies Really Vibe Code?
items.descrizione: Apparently anyone can vibe code anything these days. So Claude and I tried to make a database for tracking the petty grievances of the masses.
